description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a combination of wood and metal components, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The stock and foregrip are made of dark-stained wood, while the main body, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte-finished metal with visible wear and scratches. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, a heavy barrel, and a prominent iron sight system. There are several mechanical details, such as exposed bolts, rails, and a mounted accessory on the side, suggesting modularity and customization. The muzzle end appears reinforced, possibly with a flash hider or brake, and the overall build is substantial, indicating a weapon designed for sustained fire. The coloration is primarily dark brown and black, with hints of metallic gray and some red accents on the receiver.
description: A rugged, tactical rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, matte metal body, heavy barrel, and iron sights, showing signs of wear and modular attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, wooden stock, metal receiver, heavy barrel, and attached magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron sight, and the width of the foregrip and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger area, and additional side-mounted accessory.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the rifle's components.
